sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الشُّكْرُ عَلَى النِّعَمِ الصَّغِيرَةِ يَجْعَلُنَا أَسْعَدَ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, zahvalnost za male blagodati nas čini sretnijim.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, being grateful for small blessings makes us happier.

sentences.arabic: كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ أَقُولُ لِنَفْسِي: الْيَوْمُ يَوْمٌ جَمِيلٌ.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro govorim sebi: Danas je lijep dan.
sentences.translationEn: Every morning I say to myself: Today is a beautiful day.

sentences.arabic: نِعْمَةُ الصِّحَّةِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ أَكْبَرُ مِنَ الْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Blagodat zdravlja i porodice veća je od novca.
sentences.translationEn: The blessing of health and family is greater than money.

sentences.arabic: مَنْ يَشْكُرُ دَائِمًا يَجِدُ الْحَيَاةَ أَخَفَّ وَأَجْمَلَ.
sentences.translation: Ko je uvijek zahvalan, pronalazi da je život lakši i ljepši.
sentences.translationEn: One who is always grateful finds life lighter and more beautiful.
